item.label: Refactor events.py into modular handlers
item.summary: Split 792-line events.py into focused modules: handler dispatch, state machine, validation rules

body:
# Description

events.py (792 lines) is monolithic. Refactor into 3 focused modules:

1. **events_handler.py** — Event dispatch, routing to handlers by event type
2. **events_state.py** — State machine logic for knowledge lifecycle (init, update, delete, archive)
3. **events_validation.py** — Event validation rules, constraint checking

Each module <300 lines. Keep public API stable (no breaking changes to imports).

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] events.py split into 3 modules in src/audiagentic/knowledge/
- [ ] Each module is <300 lines
- [ ] Public API unchanged (imports still work from events module)
- [ ] All event handlers work (test with existing integration tests)
- [ ] No performance regression
- [ ] Code is more maintainable (clear separation of concerns)

# Notes

Keep __init__.py or create events/ subpackage to maintain backward compatibility.
Update imports in cli.py, sync.py, actions.py to use new modules if cleaner.
"
